sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85869" key="porfurosxh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πορφῠρο-σχήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σχῆμα</etym>) <sense id="n85869.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">purple-clad,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:4:3:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.3.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
